title: The Desperate Magician and the Imprisoned Disaster
overview: All Alto wanted was to graduate. Next thing he knows, he has a familiar with no regard for personal space.

title: The New Term and the Fairy Flower
overview: Vermeil draws the attention of the school’s Dragonriders after she defeats a dragon with a flick of her finger. Later, who will become the second-year representative?

title: A Dragonrider’s Beating Heart
overview: The Student Council is absurdly powerful, and Alto and Vermeil’s antics have landed them in the crosshairs of one member in particular: Chris, captain of the Dragonriders.

title: A Creeping Madness
overview: It's not a question if Vermeil's interested in Alto. It's a question if her demonic nature means she's interested in him or only in his mana.

title: Rampage
overview: Chris is no match for a suddenly empowered Rex, but how did he become so strong? Something sinister is happening at the academy.

title: Wish
overview: Obsidian binds Vermeil into his service! But the now berserk demoness is too powerful to control, and that means consequences for everyone. Especially for Alto.

title: Confession
overview: Something has changed between Alto and Vermeil since their encounter with Obsidian; something important.

title: Selection
overview: Alto joins the student council, but the president has an agenda of her own.

title: The Mage of Heaven's Will
overview: All they need to do to pass the practical exam is pour their mana into a flame. Simple, right? Wrong.

title: Questions
overview: Iolite may be eccentric, but he proves himself more than a match for Alto and Vermeil.

title: Past
overview: When the ignorant act on their fears and hatred, the result is a tragedy of their own making.
